data.description: Israel Transportation Minister Regev: 'Fly Dubai will operate an air train to return Israelis from Dubai to the country'

data.title: Insilico and TaiGen Achieve Milestone in Collaboration: Out-Licensed CKD Anemia Candidate ISM4808 Completes first human enrollment and dosing in Phase I clinical trial
data.description: Insilico Medicine, a biotech company based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, shared on March 5, 2026, that their AI-powered PHD inhibitor, ISM4808, has shown promise for treating anemia related to chronic kidney disease. The company, listed as Insilico Medicine on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol 03696, focuses on leveraging generative AI in its clinical-stage research.

data.title: SFL - Announces $170 Million Contract for Semi-Submersible Rig Hercules
data.description: SFL Corporation Ltd. (NYSE: SFL) revealed a recent agreement where it sealed a drilling contract in Canada with a prominent multinational oil and gas firm for its semi-submersible rig, Hercules. The deal is valued at around $170 million for a minimum period lasting 400 days.
German Economy Ministry spokesperson: Markets are liquid, we have no problem with the security of gas supply

data.title: Bitcoin rally stalls as spot ETFs see $228M outflows. US Bitcoin ETFs record 3-day outflow streak, while Solana ETFs see first losses since Feb.
data.description: Investors in the United States moved $228 million out of Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs) on Thursday, putting an end to a streak of three consecutive days of inflows. Concurrently, ETFs tied to Solana experienced their first losses since February.

data.title: AI app builders meet real-world challenges in $65B market as 2 out of 7 perform well in full-stack functionality test.
data.description: Recent testing conducted on seven AI app builders showed significant variations in performance. Out of the platforms analyzed, only two were able to provide complete full-stack functionality in response to a single prompt. This disparity underscores the importance of thorough evaluation when selecting an AI app builder for development purposes.
EU SUSPENDING VISA-FREE TRAVEL FOR HOLDERS OF GEORGIAN PASSPORTS
EU SAYS SUSPENSION IS IN RESPONSE TO GEORGIA'S VIOLATION OF COMMITMENTS UNDER VISA-FREE REGIME

data.title: BW LPG Limited: Management Share Option Plan “LTIP 2022” – Award and Exercise of Share Options
data.description: In Singapore on March 3, 2026, BW LPG Limited's Board of Directors sanctioned the granting of share options to top management and specific staff members. This allocation marks the culmination of the annual share option awards within the five-year LTIP 2022 initiated on March 1, 2022. The Company, identified by the OSE ticker code "BWLPG.OL" and NYSE ticker code "BWLP," disclosed this decision concurrently with the release of the quarterly report.

data.title: Eutelsat Announces the Completion of Its Comprehensive Re-Financing Plan, With Closing of €1.5 Billion Bond Offering
data.description: Paris-based satellite operator Eutelsat has successfully finalized its re-financing strategy, with the closure of a €1.5 billion bond offering. This move marks a significant milestone in the company's financial endeavors.

data.title: SoftBank Corp. Evolves Telecom Infrastructure for the AI Era: From Carrying Data to Orchestrating Intelligence
data.description: SoftBank is shifting its focus from being a regular telecommunications provider to becoming an AI infrastructure supplier. This will involve coordinating intelligence across various edge and cloud settings to empower devices, robots, and systems to exceed their current capabilities. The transition was announced in Barcelona, Spain on March 6, 2026.

data.title: ezW2Correction Available to File 2015-2025 W-2C & W-3C Forms
data.description: Ensure compliance with Social Security Administration electronic filing requirements for processing 10 or more returns by utilizing ezW2Correction in conjunction with E-File Direct, an additional feature. Recently unveiled in Redmond, Washington on March 6, 2026, the latest ezW2Correction 2025 software by Halfpricesoft.com is designed to assist employers and tax professionals in meeting these requirements efficiently.

data.title: UGREEN Releases Next-Generation Thunderbolt™ 5 Docking Stations to Max Out Productivity
data.description: On March 6, 2026, in London, UGREEN, a well-known global consumer electronics company, revealed that pre-orders have commenced for their newest Maxidok series of docks in Europe. The Maxidok line consists of cutting-edge Thunderbolt™ 5 docking stations. This release marks a significant advancement in docking station technology and provides European consumers the opportunity to secure these state-of-the-art devices in advance.

data.title: Bybit and Tether Deepen Strategic Collaboration With "Golden Season," Bringing Gold-Backed Stability to Crypto Investors
data.description: On March 6, 2026, in Dubai, UAE, a major player in the digital asset industry, Bybit, partnered with Tether amidst a period of market instability and growing investor wariness. This collaboration between the two entities, known for their prominent position in the market, focuses on tokenized gold. The partnership aims to introduce innovative services in the digital asset sector, leveraging the rising interest in tokenizing gold. This move comes as the market experiences fluctuations and investors exercise caution, highlighting the importance of such strategic collaborations in the rapidly evolving digital asset landscape.

data.title: MEXCampus Launches at UNSW, Expanding MEXC Foundation's University Web3 Program
data.description: In Victoria, Seychelles on March 6, 2026, the MEXC Foundation and UNCB (University Network for Cryptocurrency & Blockchain) jointly announced the debut of MEXCampus at the Roundhouse, located on the University of New South Wales (UNSW) Campus. This event marks the formal partnership between MEXC and UNCB, with MEXCampus serving as the official platform for collaboration. This initiative aims to promote blockchain technology and cryptocurrency education among the academic community.

data.title: Drivers Can Get Pre-Qualified with Capital One to Buy a Pickup Truck at Texas Truck Barn Near Burleson, Texas
data.description: In Burleson, Texas, on March 6, 2026, Texas Truck Barn introduced a new option for shoppers looking to purchase a pickup truck. The dealership now provides a streamlined process for customers to get pre-qualified with Capital One for financing. This initiative aims to offer truck buyers a straightforward and hassle-free experience when securing funds for their next vehicle.
